_meta.purpose: Tracks all deprecated code, legacy compatibility shims, and planned removals. AI agents consult this to understand what NOT to use and what is safe to remove.

status_values.ACTIVE: Legacy code still in use; do not remove yet.
status_values.INTENTIONAL_ADAPTER: Not legacy; current architecture. Planned removal in indicated phase.
status_values.PENDING_REMOVAL: Can be removed; waiting for indicated preconditions.
status_values.RETIRED: Already removed; kept as historical record.

items.title: models/tool.py — shim forwarding to shared.models.tool
items.description: Entire file is a re-export shim: 'from shared.models.tool import Tool, AdditionalPart, GeometryProfile'. Exists for callers that import from models.tool instead of shared.models.tool.
removal_preconditions: All callers inside Tools and jaws Library migrated to 'from shared.models.tool import ...'
import_path_checker.py passes with zero violations
smoke_test.py passes
items.retired_notes: Removed shim file after confirming no in-repo imports remain.

items.title: models/jaw.py — shim forwarding to shared.models.jaw
items.description: Entire file is a re-export shim: 'from shared.models.jaw import Jaw'. Exists for callers that import from models.jaw instead of shared.models.jaw.
removal_preconditions: All callers inside Tools and jaws Library migrated to 'from shared.models.jaw import ...'
import_path_checker.py passes with zero violations
smoke_test.py passes
items.retired_notes: Removed shim file after confirming no in-repo imports remain.

items.title: services/tool_service.py — _component_items_from_legacy()
items.description: Internal function converts old component storage format (shim_code, screw_code, assembly_parts fields) into the new component_items JSON array. Required for opening databases created before the schema migration in early 2026.
items.what_replaces_it: Direct use of component_items field (post-migration schema)
removal_preconditions: All databases upgraded (migration applied at startup via data/migrations.py)
No known databases exist predating the component_items schema (verify via DB audit)
Schema stabilized (Phase 6)

items.title: services/tool_service.py — _legacy_fields_from_component_items()
items.description: Reverse of DEP-003: rebuilds old field format from new component_items for backward-compatible export. Used by export to ensure files opened in older app versions remain valid.
removal_preconditions: All users migrated to app version that reads component_items natively
Old export format no longer required by any customer workflow
Phase 7 export refactor complete (ExportSpecification replaces hardcoded field mapping)

items.title: data/migrations.py — legacy table migration (tools_new rename)
items.description: Checks for old table name 'tools_new' and renames to 'tools'. Only triggers once on first open of pre-2025 databases. After running, the check is a no-op with a tiny SQL overhead.
items.what_replaces_it: Not needed once all installations have been migrated
removal_preconditions: All known installations have opened the database at least once with current version
Minimum support window for pre-2025 databases has passed

items.title: ui/home_page.py — _legacy_component_candidates()
items.description: Builds backward-compatible component rows from tool data predating the component_items field. Used in detail panel rendering when old tool format encountered.
removal_preconditions: DEP-003 and DEP-004 removed (schema fully migrated)
Phase 4 TOOLS migration complete (home_page.py restructured)

items.title: services/export_service.py — legacy field mapping (GENERAL_FIELDS vs EXPORT_BASE_FIELDS)
items.description: Two parallel field-list definitions exist: GENERAL_FIELDS (old) and EXPORT_BASE_FIELDS (new). Import logic checks which list to use based on Excel column headers found in file. Allows opening Excel files created by older app versions.
removal_preconditions: Phase 7 export consolidation complete
ExportSpecification replaces hardcoded field mapping
Old Excel files can be re-exported with new format by users

items.title: config.py — legacy runtime directory migration
items.description: Checks for old 'NTX Shared Runtime' directory and migrates settings/DB paths to new location. One-time migration; no-op after first run on new path.
removal_preconditions: Support window for installations using 'NTX Shared Runtime' path has passed
All users have run at least one version with current path scheme

items.title: ui/main_window.py — legacy modules directory fallback
items.description: Falls back to old shared module directory if new shared/ path not found. Allows running with old shared module layout. No-op in installations with correct layout.
removal_preconditions: All installations confirmed using current shared/ layout

items.title: TOOL_EDITOR_REFACTOR.md — deprecated documentation file
items.description: Historical record of April 2026 tool editor extraction. The file is marked deprecated; superseded by TOOLS_JAWS_MODULAR_OVERHAUL_GOALS.md, RULES.md, STATUS.md.
removal_preconditions: No tool references it; it is retained for historical context only

items.title: ui/jaw_export_page.py — _JawToolServiceAdapter (INTENTIONAL ADAPTER)
items.description: Wraps JawService to present a ToolService-compatible interface so ExportPage (which expects ToolService) can drive jaw data export. NOT legacy — this is current architecture to avoid duplicating export page.
removal_preconditions: Phase 7 ExportSpecification implemented
ExportPage refactored to use ExportSpecification instead of ToolService interface
JawsExportSpec created conforming to ExportSpecification

items.title: ui/jaw_export_page.py — _JawExportServiceAdapter (INTENTIONAL ADAPTER)
items.description: Subclasses ExportService, remaps field names (jaw_id → tool_id, etc.) for jaw export. NOT legacy — intentional domain bridging within Phase 1 architecture.
removal_preconditions: Same as DEP-011

items.title: ui/tool_editor_support/payload_adapter.py — ToolEditorPayloadAdapter (INTENTIONAL ADAPTER)
items.description: Manages tool payload serialization contract between dialog and service layer. Decouples dialog evolution from backend payload shape. NOT legacy — mirrors work_editor_support/model.py WorkEditorPayloadAdapter pattern.
removal_preconditions: Codec module in place and all callsites migrated
items.retired_notes: Replaced adapter class with payload codec module and migrated tool editor call sites.
